 3. Strict Physical Envelopes: Targeting a maximum diameter of 275 mm, dry weight under 25 kg, and operational limits up to Mach 0.9.
 4. Domestic Testing: Shortlisted engines will undergo rigorous ground and installed-mode testing across varying operational envelopes within India.

There are atleast 5 Indian companies that can offer system in this category.

tweets.title:
Iran Hardens Nuclear Stance Ahead of US Talks

According to Reuters, Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei has ordered that Iran’s stockpile of highly enriched uranium must remain inside the country, rejecting a key US demand to transfer it abroad.

The move complicates ongoing US–Iran negotiations and could deepen tensions with both Washington and Israel, which insist any deal must include removal of Iran’s enriched uranium stockpile.

Iranian officials reportedly fear sending the material abroad would leave the country vulnerable to future attacks.
